should_trigger.prompt: Audit how clean my .claude/research artifacts are before I cite them in a plan
Walk my plan namespaces and report which research sidecars carry weak or conflicted evidence
Show the trust-state distribution across review sidecars in this project
Tell me which research artifacts have missing or conflicting sources before I plan against them

should_not_trigger.prompt: Re-author this research note to add a new claim and re-run the analysis
Explain what the trust_state field means in the schema documentation
Run my rspec suite and report the failures
Strengthen the weak source on my-topic by finding a second independent reference

hard_should_trigger.prompt: Before I write a plan citing this research bundle, tell me how trustworthy each evidence file is and where conflicts hide
Sweep every research and review artifact under .claude/, classify each by evidence strength, then write a dated report I can review

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Add a new claim entry to topic.provenance.md and confirm the YAML still parses
Fix the conflicted source on topic, then re-run the research, then update the citing plan
